issuerId.description: An identifier for the issuer related to the stakeholder.

employeeId.description: An employee identifier for the stakeholder, if it exists.
employeeId.title:
An employee identifier for the stakeholder, if it exists.
Max length is according to what we accept when users are "writing" the data
https://github.com/carta/carta-web/blob/c23a2bed261884a665295550970c4b97969eb5c9/eshares/corporations/stakeholders/models.py#L1479

relationship.description:
The relationship of the stakeholder with the draft issuer.

 - ADVISOR: Stakeholder is an advisor
 - EX_ADVISOR: Stakeholder is an ex-advisor
 - BOARD_MEMBER: Stakeholder is a board member
 - CONSULTANT: Stakeholder is a consultant
 - EX_CONSULTANT: Stakeholder is an ex-consultant
 - EMPLOYEE: Stakeholder is an employee
 - EX_EMPLOYEE: Stakeholder is an ex-employee
 - EXECUTIVE: Stakeholder is an executive
 - FOUNDER: Stakeholder is a founder
 - INTERNATIONAL_EMPLOYEE: Stakeholder is an international employee
 - INVESTOR: Stakeholder is an investor
 - OFFICER: Stakeholder is an officer
 - OTHER: Stakeholder has some other type of relationship

group.description: The group to which the stakeholder belongs. This will not be set for all stakeholders.

country.description: The country of the stakeholder's address. This will not be set for all stakeholders.

description: A stakeholder is any person or entity who holds an outstanding security.
